hints.answer: Use a loop that runs 5 times to draw all the bricks

hints.answer: Track the x position with a variable that increases by 20 each iteration

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: All bricks have the same y position (0), width (20), and height (10)

hints.question: Hint
